title: Crispy Kale Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy vegetarian dish that combines the crunch of crispy kale with the brightness of citrus.
instructions: Wash and dry the kale leaves.
Cut the kale into bite-sized pieces and set aside.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the kale to the skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, until crispy and slightly browned.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the crispy kale hot, garnished with citrus wedges.
